profile: Otherworld Phys. Assault / self-boost DPS. Damage comes from her Feat (3-hit, counts as Normal Attack) and Ultimate (multi-hit + AoE), all amplified by Final DMG, Crit (Genesis V counter = 100% Crit Rate +30% Crit DMG), and a heavy True DMG package (Crimson Lotus +20% True DMG, Genesis %current-HP True DMG, -20% enemy True DMG RED). Her loop is fueled by ally low-HP/death triggers and self-sustains via 30% Lifesteal. Wants Final DMG, Crit, True DMG and ATK; does NOT basic-attack, apply bleed/infect, tank, or heal allies.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG +12% to +30% with no condition; multiplies every Feat/Ultimate hit she throws. Highest unconditional damage mirror for her.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: Her own mirror: on ally death (her core trigger) gain up to +80% Crit Rate / +60% Final DMG + Spirit Armor; at 3star+ it lasts 2 turns and adds armor. Perfect kit match.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Her Feat counts as a Normal/Basic Attack and multi-hits, so the per-hit True DMG (up to 50% ATK, plus on-Crit True DMG at 3star+) stacks with her crit-counter; strong True-DMG amplifier.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Crit combo mirror matches her two main scaling levers exactly; clean unconditional DPS for a crit-Final-DMG assault.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: All attacks gain True DMG (up to +20% ATK each); her many multi-hits and Crimson Lotus True-DMG theme make flat per-hit True DMG outstanding.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Final DMG +4% to +10% baseline (shield-bonus is gravy); the unconditional Final DMG floor alone keeps it high for her.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG per self-buff (up to +30%); she runs many self-buffs (Crimson Lotus, mirror procs, Soul Embers state) so it fills reliably.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Large opening Final DMG that resets on kill; her burst Ultimate and fast tempo keep refreshing it. Strong front-loaded Final DMG.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Crit Rate + Crit DMG, and at 3star+ on-Crit buff-dispel; she crits heavily (Genesis V guaranteed crit), so the stats and dispel both land.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Her Feat counts as a Normal/Basic Attack, so BATK DMG +30% and (3star+) +Crit Rate on basic attacks applies to her main 3-hit skill.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: Flat ATK% scales all her physical hits and the ATK-capped True DMG portions of her kit; simple, always-on, no anti-synergy.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: Repeated hits on one enemy ramp DMG up to +60%; her Feat (3 hits) and Ultimate multi-hits stack it fast within a turn.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Each attack ramps Final DMG (up to +50% at 5star); her 3-hit Feat and multi-hit Ultimate fill the stacks fast every turn. Excellent Final-DMG ramp for her tempo.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: Her Ultimate AoE adds large True DMG; useful in multi-enemy fights but her single-target Feat loop ignores it, so situational.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: True DMG that scales as she loses HP; she takes hits and operates around low-HP triggers, but ramp is slow vs flat True DMG mirrors.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Big True DMG but gated on [Infect] which she never applies herself; only works if a teammate infects, so conditional.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: Area-attack DMG up to +25% boosts her Ultimate AoE only; dead on her single-target Feat loop, partial coverage.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: AoE %current-HP True DMG, but keys on passively-triggered AoE; her Ultimate is active-cast, so trigger fit is loose.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5% baseline is fine; the big bonus needs enemies in Damage-Share/Transfer which she doesn't set up, so usually just the small floor.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: +8% to +20% vs debuffed enemies; she applies few debuffs herself (buff-dispel only), depends on the team, partial uptime.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: True DMG vs DoT targets; she applies no DoT, so it only fires when allies do. Conditional, off her own kit.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Flat Crit Rate; she does crit (Genesis V, mirror), so it works, but a small epic stat-stick vs the Final-DMG/True-DMG picks above.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Flat Crit DMG; pays off given her guaranteed-crit counter and crit buffs, but a minor epic value behind the synergy mirrors.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Final DMG per attack, more for Ultimate/Feat at 3star+; her multi-hits ramp it, but cap (max ~28%) is modest vs flat Firmament.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Counter/Basic ramps Basic Atk DMG and (3star+) on-kill re-attack; her Feat and Genesis counters count as Normal Attacks so it partly applies, but her core is skills not basic-attack spam, so only partial fit.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Feat-crit True DMG + Spirit Armor; she does crit Feats, but the bonus is small and the armor is minor for a DPS.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: Counter True DMG scales off DEF, which she has almost none of (def 91); negligible output on a glass assault.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG +20%; only her Ultimate benefits, none of her Feat loop or counters, so coverage is narrow.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate-only DMG that builds from Basic Attacks; she rarely basic-attacks and only the Ultimate gains, so it underperforms her kit.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Single-target ATK DMG +20%; covers her Feat but misses her AoE Ultimate, and is a plain conditional behind better DPS picks.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-attack DMG scaling with target HP lost; partial coverage (no AoE) and a slow execute-style ramp she doesn't need.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Final DMG but tiny epic values (+2% to +5%); strictly worse than Firmament/Daisy/Isabella for the same lever.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Single-skill True DMG per debuff on target; she stacks few debuffs herself, so the per-debuff multiplier rarely fills.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore helps physical hits slightly, but much of her damage is already True DMG (ignores DEF), so the lever is redundant.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG RED is a defensive crit-resist stat; does nothing for her offense and she isn't built as a damage sink.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED is pure defense; minor survivability but zero damage contribution for a DPS slot.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Half the value (Final DMG RED) is defensive; the Final DMG half exists but is HP-loss gated and smaller than dedicated DMG mirrors.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: Flat DEF%; she has negligible DEF and gains no offense from it.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: Flat HP%; minor bulk only, no damage synergy with her self-boost DPS profile.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: Larger HP% but still pure tank stat; off-role for a glass-cannon assault.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP% tank stat; no offensive return for her.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: Heal + HP; she already self-sustains via Lifesteal and gains no damage from this def mirror.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: DMG reduction; defensive anima with no offensive synergy for her.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: DMG reduction; pure mitigation, off-role for a DPS slot.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: DMG reduction; defensive, contributes nothing to her damage.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED; defensive-only, wasted in a DPS loadout.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Heal anima; she self-heals via Lifesteal and this adds no offense.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: Heal + shield support effect; survivability only, no damage scaling for her kit.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Shield support; off-role, gives her no damage.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: Shield support mirror; defensive utility unrelated to her offensive self-boost loop.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: Tank/support package (DMG RED + heal + small true-dmg); off-role, the true-dmg sliver is far below dedicated DPS mirrors.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Defensive AoE/HP mirror; the true-dmg clause is HP/def oriented and off her glass-cannon profile.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: DMG-reduction support effect; pure mitigation with no damage scaling for her DPS slot.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate; she relies on damage, not landing debuffs, so this does nothing for her.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Heal + effect-hit defensive mix; both levers are dead for a self-sustaining physical DPS.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Increases Heal output; she is not a healer, so this is wasted.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Single-target heal boost; she casts no heal skills, dead effect.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Turn-start self-heal; redundant with her Lifesteal and contributes no damage.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Effect Resist; defensive anti-CC stat (she already gets Control Immunity in Crimson Lotus), no offense.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Control mirror; she applies no control, the final-dmg sliver is tiny and gated, effectively off-kit.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Control + effect-hit; she lands no control debuffs, dead for her.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: Bonus DMG vs controlled enemies; she has no control, so the condition rarely triggers off her own kit.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: On-crit Healing-Received reduction; a control/anti-heal utility, not damage, marginal for her.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: On-being-attacked Infect chance; she neither tanks reliably nor builds around infect, near-dead.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Bleed control mirror; she applies no bleed, the effect never triggers from her actions.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Infect control mirror; she applies no infect, dead effect.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Bleed def mirror; no bleed in her kit and it is off-role.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Control + effect-hit + true-dmg, all gated on control she doesn't apply; the true-dmg clause never fires for her.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final-dmg tied to control/effect-hit; the conditions are control-based, which she lacks, so it stays inert.
